prompts: Cinematic wide shot in a warm wood Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Eri Ashbell, an androgynous adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf, stands before Eri Silverbrook, a masculine guild coordinator in a formal cloak. Ashbell presents a sealed quest parcel with both hands toward Silverbrook. Lively guild background, soft warm lighting, high detail, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Eri Silverbrook, the masculine guild coordinator, accepts the sealed quest parcel from Eri Ashbell. Both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to complete the handoff. Consistent character appearance, warm anime RPG lighting, no text, no watermark.
